$comment: Controlled vocabulary of product categories tracked by Roofing Software Guide. See roofingsoftwareguide.com for context. Maintained by RSG; CC BY 4.0.

categories.label: Estimating
categories.description: Quote builders, takeoff tools, profit calculators for residential and commercial roof jobs.

categories.label: Measurement
categories.description: Aerial measurement services and drone-based roof reports.

categories.label: CRM
categories.description: Lead capture, pipeline tracking, customer communication for roofing companies.

categories.label: Scheduling
categories.description: Crew dispatch, job calendars, field-to-office sync.

categories.label: Field service / all-in-one
categories.description: Suites that combine multiple categories above into a single platform.

categories.label: Production / job management
categories.description: Material ordering, supplier integration, production scheduling, completion tracking.

categories.label: Marketing
categories.description: Door-knocking apps, canvassing tools, lead-gen platforms specific to roofing.
